summary: Crew Payment Deep Link & CrewHub Integration Testing Complete. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. All crew payment endpoints working correctly. Frontend: CrewPaymentPage component renders correctly with booking details, captain info, payment status, and progress bar.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/bookings/{id}/crew-payment-details returns booking info, my_share, and captain details correctly
POST /api/bookings/{id}/crew-pay endpoint exists and validates required fields (participant_id, amount)
Push notification functions exist in push.py: notify_crew_payment_request (line 436), notify_crew_payment_received (line 483), notify_crew_payment_expiring (line 526)
CrewPaymentPage component at /app/frontend/src/components/CrewPaymentPage.js renders with data-testid='crew-payment-page'
BookingCard imports CrewHub (line 9) and shows 'Pay Now' button (line 129) for non-host crew members
App.js has route for /bookings/pay/:bookingId at line 650-658
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test booking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crew Payment Deep Link feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/bookings/{id}/crew-payment-details (returns booking, my_share, captain), POST /api/bookings/{id}/crew-pay (deducts credits, updates payment status). Frontend route /bookings/pay/:bookingId renders CrewPaymentPage component. BookingCard shows CrewHub for scheduled booking hosts and 'Pay Now' button for non-host crew members. Push notification functions for crew payments exist in push.py.

GET_crew_payment_details.details: Returns booking info (id, location, session_date, total_price, status, payment_progress), my_share (share_amount, payment_status, paid_amount), and captain (id, full_name, avatar_url)

GET_crew_payment_details_requires_user_i.details: Returns 422 validation error when user_id missing

POST_crew_pay_endpoint_exists.details: Endpoint accepts POST with participant_id, amount, payment_method

push_onesignal_config.details: GET /api/push/onesignal/config returns app_id and enabled status

push_send_endpoint.details: POST /api/push/send endpoint works (returns skipped if OneSignal not configured)

crew_payment_page_route.details: Frontend route /bookings/pay/:bookingId is accessible and renders CrewPaymentPage

CrewPaymentPage_component.details: Component renders with data-testid='crew-payment-page', shows captain info, session details, payment status, and progress bar

BookingCard_CrewHub_integration.details: BookingCard imports CrewHub (line 9) for scheduled booking hosts

BookingCard_PayNow_button.details: BookingCard shows 'Pay Now' button (line 129) for non-host crew members that navigates to /bookings/pay/{id}

push_notification_functions.details: notify_crew_payment_request (line 436), notify_crew_payment_received (line 483), notify_crew_payment_expiring (line 526) exist in push.py

mocked_apis.note: OneSignal push notifications are MOCKED/skipped when API key not configured. All other endpoints use real database operations.
